'''zhananga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doblon|doblon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doblon|doblon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhananga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænængæth|zhænængæth]] || [[word:zhænængæj|zhænængæj]] || [[word:zhænængæsh|zhænængæsh]] || [[word:zhænængæ|zhænængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhananangath|zhananangath]] || [[word:zhananangaj|zhananangaj]] || [[word:zhananangash|zhananangash]] || [[word:zhanananga|zhanananga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanangath|zhanangath]] || [[word:zhanangaj|zhanangaj]] || [[word:zhanangash|zhanangash]] || [[word:zhananga|zhananga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanafngath|zhanafngath]] || [[word:zhanafngaj|zhanafngaj]] || [[word:zhanafngash|zhanafngash]] || [[word:zhanafngaf|zhanafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanangatha|zhanangatha]] || [[word:zhanangaja|zhanangaja]] || [[word:zhanangasha|zhanangasha]] || [[word:zhanangaka|zhanangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanangath|zhanangath]] || [[word:zhanangaj|zhanangaj]] || [[word:zhanangash|zhanangash]] || [[word:zhananga|zhananga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanangathal|zhanangathal]] || [[word:zhanangajal|zhanangajal]] || [[word:zhanangashal|zhanangashal]] || [[word:zhanangakal|zhanangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanangathatha|zhanangathatha]] || [[word:zhanangajaja|zhanangajaja]] || [[word:zhanangashasha|zhanangashasha]] || [[word:zhanangaka|zhanangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanangathan|zhanangathan]] || [[word:zhanangajan|zhanangajan]] || [[word:zhanangashan|zhanangashan]] || [[word:zhanangakan|zhanangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanangathaoro|zhanangathaoro]] || [[word:zhanangajaoro|zhanangajaoro]] || [[word:zhanangashaoro|zhanangashaoro]] || [[word:zhanangakaoro|zhanangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
